title: bridge.result
description: What the sidecar returns to the desktop. Fail-closed + receipt-mandatory: `result` is non-null ONLY when `ok` is true and a `receipt` is present; a failure never carries a result.

result.description: The AI turn's output. Non-null iff ok=true.

receipt.description: The governed-run receipt (from bro_supervisor.SupervisorResult). Mandatory alongside any result.
